characters.description: A spatial-affinity demonic tree who leads Ashfallen from Red Vine Peak. His Necroflora Sovereign skill lets him turn corpses into specialized Ent defenders, and he is extending both his root network and his young sect.
characters.name: Ashlock

characters.description: Ashlock's daughter and a spatial cultivator. Pressure during the tournament awakened a bloodline response that sharpens her thinking when her position feels threatened, but the effect quickly exhausts her.
characters.name: Stella Crestfallen

characters.description: An Ashfallen ally with a transformative bloodline. Her physical changes distinguish her inherited power from Stella's mentally focused awakening, making her a contrasting example as the group tries to understand Stella's new ability.
characters.name: Diana

characters.description: A teacher and researcher at Darklight City Academy. Her family has withdrawn from the city while leaving her behind, and Ashfallen considers using her remaining contact with her father to pass misleading information.
characters.name: Elaine

characters.description: Ashfallen's earth-working builder. The constant demands of construction consume the key he would otherwise use for cultivation, prompting Ashlock to provide him with specialized assistance.
characters.name: Douglas

characters.description: A Redclaw elder associated with Ashfallen.
characters.name: Elder Margret

characters.description: The unnamed leader of the Redclaw family and Ashlock's principal adviser. He accepts the family's place beneath Ashfallen and takes charge of recruitment, protection, and the management of its alchemists.
characters.name: Redclaw Grand Elder

characters.description: A Redclaw elder assigned to recruit cultivators and servants for Ashfallen's expansion at White Stone Palace.
characters.name: Elder Brent

characters.description: A light-affinity cultivator traveling with Hammond and a shadow-affinity merchant to meet the pill supplier known as Roselyn.
characters.name: Lucius

characters.description: An alchemist connected to the Redclaw family.
characters.name: Kane Azurecrest

characters.description: A merchant who requests a business meeting with Stella as the Ashfallen Trading Company is founded.
characters.name: Knox

characters.description: A dangerous spatial cultivator associated with Knox and the proposed merchant network. He previously sold the short-range portal technique used by Ashlock and Stella, giving him relevant knowledge of one of their core abilities.
characters.name: Hammond

characters.description: A Silverspire inheritance contender whose position could be damaged if his family is publicly connected to Ashfallen's unusual pills. The sect therefore treats open distribution through his family as a political risk.
characters.name: Ryker

characters.description: Ashlock's giant spider guardian and one of Red Vine Peak's established defenders. With the new Ents available to protect Ashlock, Larry is released from guard duty long enough to hunt in the wilderness alongside Kaida.
characters.name: Larry

characters.description: Ashlock's serpent summon and a capable wilderness hunter. Once the new Ents can cover Red Vine Peak, Kaida is paired with Larry and sent beyond the sect's territory to seek prey and useful cultivation resources.
characters.name: Kaida

characters.description: The Blood Lotus patriarch and a blood-affinity Nascent Soul cultivator. Reports about his conduct toward certain women remain unconfirmed, but Stella expects he may pursue her after leaving closed-door cultivation.
characters.name: Vincent Nightrose

characters.description: A lightning-affinity Ent created from Theron's body. His attacks are highly destructive, but powering them requires Ashlock to convert spatial key into a less controlled form.
characters.name: Zeus

characters.description: A compact void-affinity Ent created from Lillian's body. Forming this altered body nearly drains the combined reserves available to Ashlock and his allies.
characters.name: Chaos

characters.description: A turtle-like earth-affinity Ent made from Roderick's body for construction work. He serves under Douglas and must periodically return to Ashlock or one of Ashlock's offspring to avoid decay.
characters.name: Geb

characters.description: A massive black-wood Ent maintained as one of Ashlock's established defenders. His size and affinity give the growing Ent force a durable frontline presence.
characters.name: Titus

characters.description: A shadow-affinity merchant who arrives at White Stone Palace with Hammond and Lucius. She recognizes Stella behind the Roselyn identity and is pursuing an objective of her own.
characters.name: Nox

characters.description: The cover identity Stella Crestfallen uses during Ashfallen's meeting with the visiting merchants.
characters.name: Roselyn

characters.description: A non-sentient light-affinity Ent made by Ashlock. It can heal injuries, protect allies, and attack, but depends on key to remain active.
characters.name: Light Ent

characters.description: Ashlock's light-affinity Ent, brought into a hostile spatial realm for accurate long-range attacks. Sustained fire depletes him, but his range lets Stella gather prey while remaining under protection.
characters.name: Sol

characters.description: A maimed Voidmind scion left permanently marked by void corruption after the Darklight City tournament. A family committee gives him three months to refute the Skyrend accusation against him or be surrendered to prevent war.
characters.name: Dante Voidmind

characters.description: Dante Voidmind's father, who leads the Voidmind family. He is prepared to hand Dante over if that sacrifice will avert conflict with the Skyrend family.
characters.name: Voidmind Grand Elder

characters.description: A member of the Skyrend family who submitted the report naming Dante Voidmind as the principal instigator in the deaths of two Skyrend scions.
characters.name: Demetrios Skyrend

characters.description: A squirrel-like ally bound to Ashlock who reappears during a test of Dimensional Overlap. He redirects the experiment into the void, bringing Red Vine Peak into contact with powerful beings there.
characters.name: Maple

characters.description: A blue-haired world walker and one of Maple's elder siblings. The name is Ashlock's translation label rather than the being's true name, and Neptune seeks a pact that might loosen heaven's confinement.
characters.name: Neptune

characters.description: A red-haired world walker and one of Maple's elder siblings. Ashlock's translation effect supplies the name, and Mars views a pact with Ashlock as a possible route beyond heaven's restrictions.
characters.name: Mars

characters.description: A Redclaw elder associated with Ashfallen.
characters.name: Elder Mo

characters.description: A Star Core cultivator who supports Ashfallen's merchant presentation under the Silverspire name. His backing gives the young company political credibility during a dangerous negotiation.
characters.name: Sebastian Silverspire

characters.description: Ashlock's first named progeny and first offspring to reach Star Core. Willow operates the newly created Skyborne Bastion, giving Ashlock a mobile spatial fortress beyond his rooted domain.
characters.name: Willow Ashfallen

characters.description: Ashlock's newly named ink-affinity progeny and operator of the second Skyborne Bastion. Quill's concealed fortress serves as a library, defensive shelter, and cultivation home at Red Vine Peak.
characters.name: Quill Ashfallen

characters.description: The full name of Diana, Ashfallen's winged demonic-mist cultivator, used when she registers with the Eternal Pursuit Pavilion. She enters as an Iron Seeker so the sect can gain a discreet route for selling pills.
characters.name: Diana Ravenborne

characters.description: A member of the Voidmind family who witnesses Dante Voidmind and Knox agree to escape together. He must warn Dante's mother if Dante does not confirm that he reached safety.
characters.name: Jasper Voidmind

characters.description: A Slymere civilian badly injured when the lightning storm destroys his home. Ashlock rescues him, and Sol heals him alongside his wife Catherine while their young daughter remains with them.
characters.name: Julian

characters.description: Julian's wife, rescued with her family after the lightning storm destroys their Slymere home. Sol treats her injuries before the family is sent to safety.
characters.name: Catherine

characters.description: The daughter of Julian and Catherine. After sharing Stella Crestfallen's spirit-root truffle with her parents, she is a new cultivator living with them in Ashfallen City.
characters.name: Jasmine
